current_objective: Net-new discovery cycle (runtime priority 3, project 01 operator-gated). Ran the org's FIRST deliberately OWNED-POSITION candidate (TASK-0024), built to pass the ADR-018 strip-out-the-AI screen: a specialty-insurance MGA/program for emerging hard-to-place lithium-ion / BESS commercial fire risk -- an MGA owns distribution + sits in the underwriting transaction (commission/profit-share) + accumulates proprietary loss data, with AI as the underwriting tool not the product. It PASSED the ADR-018 lead screen (first candidate to do so -- strip out the AI and an MGA is still a business; NOT the documentation archetype) then was KILLED at the second-stage both-sides vacuum check -> OPP-008 scored 58/100 -> ARCHIVE (fifth Archived row; 8th consecutive cap 79/71/72/63/64/58/54/58). Three gates sank it: (1) placement wedge owned -- NARDAC (Amwins MGA) secured BESS binding authority Mar-2024, $50M from 8 Lloyd's syndicates; Amwins BESS product line; Travelers writes the class; BikeInsure owns micromobility fleets; (2) the vacuum is a TRANSIENT hard-market cycle, not structural -- energy insurance enters 2026 with renewed competition/capacity returning; (3) the moat fails twice -- AI underwriting is a commoditized purchasable platform (hyperexponential/Earnix/Federato; table stakes), and the loss-data moat is a COLD-START that accrues only to incumbents (NARDAC 2yr, Federato 20yr datasets); plus an MGA needs regulated binding authority/capital = un-buildable by a small org. CompWk 4, Defens 3, AI 5. LOAD-BEARING META (ADR-019, REFINES ADR-018, does not supersede it): the first owned-position play PASSED ADR-018 and STILL capped -> passing the strip-out-the-AI screen is NECESSARY but NOT SUFFICIENT. Add a THIRD-STAGE owned-position filter. Still no 2nd >=80 project; project 01 still HOLD/operator-gated.
current_phase: PHASE 1 (discovery). Project 01 in VALIDATION HOLD (operator-gated, TASK-0014). Funnel continues net-new discovery next cycle. DOCTRINE STACK (apply in sequence BEFORE deep research): (1) ADR-018 strip-out-the-AI screen (FIRST) -- 'strip out the AI, is there still a business: a workflow I own, a transaction I sit in, data only I have, a channel only I reach?' If the product IS the AI reading documents, reject. (2) ADR-015 both-sides named-incumbent vacuum check -- name capture+recovery incumbents; verify no-owner affirmatively. (3) ADR-019 third-stage owned-position filter (NEW -- OPP-008 passed (1) and still capped): (a) DURABLE vacuum (structural, not a transient hard-market/deadline cycle incumbents refill in 12-24 months); (b) ZERO-STATE moat (originable from the FIRST customers -- network/workflow lock-in that compounds immediately; beware cold-start data moats that accrue only to the incumbent); (c) BUILDABLE without heavy regulated capital (no charter/licensing/underwriting-capacity/balance-sheet barrier). Next candidate: owned-position play, zero-state-originable moat, structurally unserved niche, buildable without a regulated charter.
next_action: Continue net-new discovery under ADR-018/ADR-015/ADR-019 now that TASK-0025 evaluator gates are implemented. Run scripts/verify_cycle.sh before task closure.
